items_flat.title_en: Harness optimization cuts legal-agent cost without changing weights
items_flat.title_zh: 不改模型權重，優化執行框架即可大降法律代理成本
items_flat.summary_en: A Hugging Face demonstration reported a sevenfold cost reduction on a legal-reasoning benchmark by optimizing the runtime harness while freezing model weights.
items_flat.summary_zh: Hugging Face 示範顯示，在凍結模型權重下只優化執行框架，法律推理基準的單題成本可降低約七倍。

items_flat.title_en: Reports point to a near-term GPT-5.6 rollout
items_flat.title_zh: 產業消息指向 GPT-5.6 即將推出
items_flat.summary_en: Pre-launch reporting pointed to a July rollout for GPT-5.6 with expanded plan limits and stronger safeguards; the item was marked as a report, not an official release.
items_flat.summary_zh: 上市前消息指 GPT-5.6 將於 7 月推出，並可能提高方案用量與強化防護；此則明確標示為產業消息而非官方發布。
